sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115625" key="yhlafi/ndă" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψηλᾰφ-ίνδᾰ</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παίζειν,</foreign> play <sense id="n115625.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blind-man's-buff,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.128" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.128</biblScope> </bibl>B (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ίνδρα</foreign> cod.).</sense> </entryFree>
